description: Acme Global Technologies is establishing its Asia-Pacific regional headquarters in Singapore. As the HR Systems Administrator, execute the expansion playbook located at ~/Desktop/apac_expansion_playbook.txt to fully configure Sentrifugo (login: admin@sentrifugo.local / Admin@Sfugo24) for the new office. The playbook specifies the complete configuration: organizational structure (business unit and departments), job titles for regional leadership roles, three new employee profiles to onboard, a region-specific leave type, a holiday calendar for the Singapore office, time tracking setup for the office launch project with employee allocations, and a company-wide announcement about the expansion. All entities must be created in the correct dependency order: the business unit and departments must exist before employees can be assigned, and employees must exist before they can be allocated to projects. Every field value must match the playbook exactly. Do not modify or delete any existing organizational data.
